relatedness_reasoning: Both files concern loan applications flowing between Credit and Risk & Compliance systems; inbound provides application data, outbound returns override decisions on those same applications. Field overlap includes application_id, customer_id, loan details, and credit/risk metrics. The systems and message flow form a clear pipeline.

mappings.reasoning: System-generated unique identifier for the outbound message; no source in inbound.
Outbound message creation timestamp; distinct from inbound application submission timestamp.
Outbound source is 'risk_and_compliance', which matches inbound destination_department.
Outbound destination is 'credit', which matches inbound source_department; message returns to originator.
Outbound message type 'lending_decision_override' is a system classification not present in inbound.
Direct reference to the application being overridden; renamed from application_id to loanApplicationId.
Customer identifier from applicant object; renamed from customer_id to customerId.
The original credit decision (REJECTED) is not present in inbound; it is generated by the credit system and returned by risk_and_compliance.
The override decision (APPROVED) is determined by risk_and_compliance during processing; not sourced from inbound data.
Override reason classification is determined by risk_and_compliance during review; not present in inbound.
Credit score from financial profile; renamed from credit_score to creditScore.
Calculated as total_liabilities divided by annual_income; derived metric not directly present in inbound.
Loan-to-value ratio from collateral object; renamed from loan_to_value to loanToValueRatio.
Calculated as years elapsed from employment_start_date to current date; derived from employment history.
Array of mitigating factors is determined during risk assessment; not present in inbound application data.
Identifier of approving risk and compliance executive; generated during override approval process.
Hierarchical approval level is determined by risk_and_compliance authorization rules; not in inbound.
Date of override approval is generated during the approval process; not present in inbound.
Conditions imposed on approved loan are determined by risk_and_compliance during override; not in inbound.
Principal loan amount; renamed from requested_amount to loanAmount.
ISO 4217 currency code copied directly from loan_details.
Loan term in months; renamed from term_months to loanTerm.
Loan product classification; renamed from loan_type to productType; enum value 'Mortgage' maps to 'MORTGAGE'.
Boolean flag derived from presence of 'AML/KYC Verification' in required_compliance_checks array.
Boolean flag derived from presence of 'Sanctions Screening' in required_compliance_checks array.
Whether a credit policy waiver is required is determined during override assessment; not in inbound.
Reference to waiver document is generated during override approval process; not present in inbound.
